comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text:
🌍 After watching this journey, did Afghanistan surprise you in any way? Share your thoughts below—we read every comment carefully.
📍 Tell us where you’re watching from, and let’s slowly build a community of curious minds from around the world.
✨ If this story gave you a new perspective, consider subscribing and passing it on to someone who loves discovering the unseen side of our planet.
Your support helps us continue revealing places that deserve to be understood, not just seen.

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: You’re very welcome! ❤️ So glad to have you here. Please stay tuned and keep supporting the channel for more adventures! 😊✨

comments.author: @nabiilmedia1
comments.text: watching from kenya but oroginly from somalia

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thank you so much! It’s amazing to have you watching from Kenya with Somali roots. 🇰🇪🇸🇴 I love how travel brings us all together. Please stay tuned and keep supporting the channel for more adventures! ✨🙏
